marketplace.description: The user runs a platform where multiple third-party sellers collect payments through it (Stripe Connect / Adyen for Platforms / Mangopay use case).
marketplace.ask_if_below_threshold: Do multiple independent sellers collect payments through your platform? / ¿Cobran múltiples vendedores independientes a través de tu plataforma?
marketplace.context_note: Phase 1 supports Stripe Connect only. Adyen for Platforms and Mangopay ship in Phase 2/3.

mobile_digital_goods.description: A mobile app (iOS / Android) selling digital goods or subscriptions. Apple/Google require their IAP system for digital content (post-Epic v. Apple 2025 there is a US carveout for external links, but with an entitlement requirement).
mobile_digital_goods.context_note: Apple/Google require IAP for digital content sold inside mobile apps. Post-Epic v. Apple (2025) ruling, US apps may use external payment links with an Apple entitlement. RevenueCat / Adapty wrap IAP for cross-platform projects. Phase 1 detects this case and warns; full IAP templates ship in Phase 3.
mobile_digital_goods.ask_if_below_threshold: Is your app a mobile native app selling digital content? / ¿Es una app móvil nativa vendiendo contenido digital?

save_card_subscription.description: The app keeps a card on file for recurring billing or one-click purchases (SetupIntent on Stripe, vault tokens on Braintree, etc.).
save_card_subscription.ask_if_below_threshold: Do you need to save the customer's card to charge again later? / ¿Necesitas guardar la tarjeta para cobrar de nuevo en el futuro?

creator_donations.description: Creators / individuals collecting tips or donations without operating a full e-commerce. Hosted-checkout providers usually fit better than processor integrations.
creator_donations.ask_if_below_threshold: Is this a creator/donation profile rather than a product checkout? / ¿Es un perfil de creator o donaciones, no un checkout de producto?
creator_donations.context_note: Ko-fi / BuyMeACoffee / Polar specialized donation providers ship in Phase 3.
